result.stdout:
CS-Syntaxer v3.2.7.0
Syntax provider for C# scripts (cs-script).
Copyright (C) 2022 Oleg Shilo (github.com/oleg-shilo/syntaxer.core)
Path: /tmp/inspectra-help-cs-syntaxer-3.2.7-ac1cf620dcbc4c82bfb5fee2f2840006/tool/.store/cs-syntaxer/3.2.7/cs-syntaxer/3.2.7/tools/net10.0/any/syntaxer.dll
------------
-detect
    Prints location of the detected CS-Script installation as well as its own assembly path.
-kill
    Terminates all currently running syntaxer services.
    It's an equivalent of `syntaxer -list kill *` command.
-list|-ls [<kill|k> [*]]
    Prints list of all currently running syntaxer services.
    kill|k - Allow user to select and terminate any running syntaxer service.
    * - Allow user to terminate all running syntaxer service when 'kill' option is used.
    *   (e.g. syntaxer -list kill * ).
